name: Login page renders GitHub OAuth button and handles unauthenticated access
description: The login page shows a GitHub sign-in button as the primary authentication method, with branding elements and a redirect to the platform after successful authentication.

planSteps.description: Verify the login page displays a 'Sign in with GitHub' button prominently centered on the page, with the FirstIssue.dev branding visible and a dark themed background
Verify there is a link or option to go back to the homepage, and the page does not show any navigation sidebar (the login page uses a standalone layout without the app sidebar)
